title: PPL Corporation recognized by DiversityInc as a leader in diversity and inclusion

title: PPL Corporation to Conduct Webcast on Second-Quarter 2023 Earnings Results
text: ALLENTOWN, Pa. , July 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) will release consolidated second-quarter 2023 earnings results on Friday, Aug. 4.

title: PPL receives top score of 100% on the 2023 Disability Equality Index
text: ALLENTOWN, Pa. , July 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PPL Corporation is pleased to announce it has received a top score of 100% on the 2023  Disability Equality Index® (DEI),  earning it the designation as one of the best places to work for people with disabilities.

title: PPL: A Growth-Rich Utility, But Near Fair Value, Neutral Chart
text: The Utilities sector ETF (XLU) led stocks on CPI Day, with PPL Corporation (PPL) being a steady performer in the sector. PPL, which operates regulated electric and gas assets, has a robust growth outlook and strong balance sheet, with dividends expected to rise 6-8% through 2026. Despite some bearish trends, the stock is seen as a good buy on a dip to the mid-$20s, but it is currently not undervalued enough to upgrade from a hold rating.

title: PPL Unit Boosts Reliability & Cuts Cost by Using DLR Tech
text: PPL subsidiary, PPL Electric Utilities, increases the reliability of transmission lines with the use of the Dynamic Line Rating technology.
